title: Hiring Production Engineer at Exide Industries Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Exide Industries Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Exide Industries Digital Technologies:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries Digital Technologies!
